title: UI Creator Component Manifest
description: Machine-readable registry of all available components, their props, plugins, and page templates for the zero-deploy config-driven platform.

core.description: Built into the client bundle, always available

charts.description: SVG-based chart components (no external charting library)

ai.description: AI/LLM UI components for chat, streaming, and feedback

advanced.description: Complex form controls, data grids, diff viewer, command palette

media.description: Audio, video, image capture and playback components

components.name: Card
components.description: Smart card wrapper that auto-renders title/description as CardHeader and children as CardContent

title.description: Card title rendered inside CardHeader > CardTitle

description.description: Card description rendered inside CardHeader > CardDescription

children.description: Card body content rendered inside CardContent

components.name: CardHeader
components.description: Card header section with flex column layout and padding

components.name: CardTitle
components.description: Card title rendered as h3 with semibold font

components.name: CardDescription
components.description: Card description paragraph in muted foreground color

components.name: CardContent
components.description: Card content area with padding

components.name: CardFooter
components.description: Card footer with flex row layout

components.name: Button
components.description: Clickable button with multiple visual variants and sizes

components.name: OAuthButton
components.description: OAuth sign-in button with provider icon (Google/GitHub) and configurable action

components.name: Badge
components.description: Small status indicator badge with variant styling

components.name: Separator
components.description: Visual divider line, optionally with centered text label

components.name: Avatar
components.description: Circular avatar showing image or name initials fallback

name.description: User name for alt text and initials

components.name: Skeleton
components.description: Animated placeholder skeleton for loading states

components.name: Icon
components.description: SVG icon renderer from built-in icon set

components.name: Input
components.description: Styled text input field

components.name: Textarea
components.description: Multi-line text input

components.name: Label
components.description: Styled form label element

components.name: Select
components.description: Dropdown select input with configurable options

components.name: Checkbox
components.description: Styled checkbox with optional label

components.name: Switch
components.description: Toggle switch for boolean on/off settings

components.name: RadioGroup
components.description: Radio button group with configurable options

components.name: Slider
components.description: Range slider input with optional label and value display

components.name: Toggle
components.description: Pressable toggle button with on/off state

components.name: ToggleGroup
components.description: Group of toggle buttons with single or multiple selection

components.name: Form
components.description: Config-driven form renderer that fetches field definitions from API

components.name: Grid
components.description: CSS Grid layout container with responsive column support

cols.description: Column count or responsive object {default, sm, md, lg, xl}

components.name: ScrollArea
components.description: Scrollable container with configurable orientation and max height

components.name: AspectRatio
components.description: Container that maintains a fixed aspect ratio

components.name: ResizablePanelGroup
components.description: Container for resizable panels

components.name: ResizablePanel
components.description: Individual resizable panel

components.name: ResizableHandle
components.description: Drag handle between resizable panels

components.name: Collapsible
components.description: Expandable/collapsible container with trigger

components.name: PageHeader
components.description: Page-level header with large title and description

components.name: Dialog
components.description: Modal dialog overlay with backdrop

components.name: Sheet
components.description: Slide-in panel from any screen edge

components.name: AlertDialog
components.description: Confirmation dialog with Cancel and Action buttons

components.name: Drawer
components.description: Bottom sheet drawer with drag handle

components.name: Popover
components.description: Floating popover panel anchored to trigger

components.name: HoverCard
components.description: Card that appears on hover

trigger.description: Element that shows card on hover

components.name: Tooltip
components.description: Small text popup on hover

components.name: DropdownMenu
components.description: Click-to-open dropdown menu with configurable items

items.description: Array of {label, icon?, href?, disabled?, variant?, separator?, action?}

components.name: ContextMenu
components.description: Right-click context menu with shortcut display

items.description: Array of {label, shortcut?, disabled?, separator?, variant?}

components.name: Alert
components.description: Alert banner with variant styling

components.name: Progress
components.description: Progress bar with optional label and percentage

components.name: Tabs
components.description: Tab bar with underline-style active indicator. Each tab's children are rendered as page content.

tabs.description: Array of {value, label, children: [...]} tab definitions

components.name: ShadcnTabs
components.description: Shadcn-styled tabs with pill indicator and vertical support

components.name: Accordion
components.description: Expandable accordion with single or multiple open items

collapsible.description: Allow full collapse in single mode

components.name: Breadcrumb
components.description: Breadcrumb navigation trail

components.name: Pagination
components.description: Pagination with previous/next and page numbers

components.name: NavigationMenu
components.description: Navigation menu with nested dropdown sub-menus

items.description: Array of {label, href?, icon?, active?, children?}

components.name: Menubar
components.description: Horizontal menu bar with dropdown menus

menus.description: Array of {label, items: [{label, shortcut?, disabled?, separator?, action?}]}

components.name: Table
components.description: Styled HTML table with scroll overflow. Use with TableHeader, TableBody, TableRow, TableHead, TableCell.

components.name: Calendar
components.description: Interactive month calendar with date selection

components.name: Carousel
components.description: Image/content carousel with prev/next and dots

components.name: Command
components.description: Command palette with search and filterable grouped items

items.description: Array of {label, value?, icon?, disabled?, group?}

components.name: StatCard
components.description: Dashboard stat card with value, icon, and trend indicator

components.name: DataTable
components.description: Data table with typed columns, datasource fetching, and skeleton loading

columns.description: Array of {label, key, type?, currency?, badgeMap?, link?}

components.name: ActivityFeed
components.description: Activity feed timeline with action icons and timestamps

components.name: BarChart
components.description: Bar chart with vertical/horizontal layout, stacking, and multi-category support

data.description: Array of data records keyed by category name

categories.description: Category keys to plot as bars

colors.description: CSS color strings for each category

components.name: LineChart
components.description: SVG line chart with monotone/linear curves, dots, multi-series

components.name: AreaChart
components.description: SVG area chart with gradient fills and multi-series

components.name: DonutChart
components.description: Donut/pie chart with center label and interactive segments

components.name: PieChart
components.description: Alias for DonutChart with variant='pie'

components.name: SparkChart
components.description: Compact inline sparkline (line/bar/area)

components.name: BarList
components.description: Horizontal bar list for ranking data

components.name: CategoryBar
components.description: Segmented category bar with marker indicator

components.name: Tracker
components.description: Status tracker with colored blocks for uptime visualization

components.name: ChatMessage
components.description: Chat bubble with role-based styling, avatar, and streaming indicator

example.content: How can I help you today?

components.name: ChatInput
components.description: Auto-resizing chat input with send button and Enter-to-send

components.name: StreamingText
components.description: Text streaming animation with cursor

components.name: MarkdownPreview
components.description: Lightweight Markdown renderer (headers, bold, italic, code, links, lists, blockquotes)

components.name: CodeBlock
components.description: Code block with line numbers, copy button, and language label

components.name: FeedbackButtons
components.description: Thumbs/stars/emoji feedback for AI responses

components.name: SourceCitation
components.description: Numbered source citations with links and snippets

components.name: DatePicker
components.description: Date picker with label and min/max constraints

components.name: DateRangePicker
components.description: Date range picker with start/end inputs

components.name: MultiSelect
components.description: Multi-select with search, tags, and max item limit

components.name: FileUpload
components.description: Drag-and-drop file upload with preview and validation

components.name: Stepper
components.description: Step progress indicator with horizontal/vertical orientation

components.name: Timeline
components.description: Vertical timeline with colored dots and dates

items.description: Array of {title, description?, date?, icon?, color?}

components.name: Kanban
components.description: Kanban board with columns, cards, priority colors, and tags

columns.description: Array of {id, title, color?, cards: [{id, title, description?, assignee?, priority?, tags?}]}

components.name: VirtualDataGrid
components.description: Virtualized data grid for large datasets with sorting and selection

columns.description: Array of {key, label, width?, sortable?, align?}

components.name: RichTextEditor
components.description: WYSIWYG editor with toolbar for formatting, headings, lists, links, code

components.name: ColorPicker
components.description: Color picker with presets, native input, and alpha slider

components.name: CommandPalette
components.description: Cmd+K command palette with search, groups, and keyboard navigation

items.description: Array of {id, label, description?, icon?, group?, shortcut?, action?}

components.name: DiffViewer
components.description: Side-by-side or unified diff viewer with LCS algorithm

components.name: Marquee
components.description: Infinite horizontal scrolling marquee

components.name: BlurFade
components.description: Blur+fade+slide entrance animation on scroll

components.name: AnimatedBeam
components.description: Animated glowing beam line via SVG gradient

components.name: GradientText
components.description: Animated shifting gradient text

components.name: TypingAnimation
components.description: Typewriter text animation with blinking cursor

components.name: NumberTicker
components.description: Animated counting number with easing, triggered on scroll

components.name: ParticleField
components.description: Canvas-based animated particle field with connecting lines

components.name: DockNav
components.description: macOS-style dock with hover magnification

components.name: AudioRecorder
components.description: Audio recorder with waveform, timer, playback, download

components.name: AudioPlayer
components.description: Audio player with play/pause, seek, volume, cover art

components.name: VideoPlayer
components.description: Video player with custom overlay controls

components.name: VideoRecorder
components.description: Video recorder with camera preview, timer, playback

components.name: ImageAnnotator
components.description: Image with drawable annotation rectangles and labels

annotations.description: Array of {x, y, width, height, label, color?} in percentages

components.name: ScreenCapture
components.description: Screen capture via getDisplayMedia with preview and download

templates.description: Analytics dashboard with KPI cards, charts, activity feed, and data table

templates.name: analytics-overview

templates.description: Full analytics page with SparkCharts, AreaChart, DonutChart, and BarList

templates.name: auth-login-split
templates.label: Login (Split Layout)
templates.description: Split-screen login page with branding panel and form

templates.name: settings-profile
templates.label: Settings / Profile
templates.description: Tabbed settings page for profile, security, and notifications

templates.name: pricing-page
templates.label: Pricing Page
templates.description: Three-tier pricing comparison with feature lists and CTAs

templates.name: kanban-board
templates.label: Kanban Board
templates.description: Project management kanban board with columns and priority-colored cards

templates.name: onboarding-wizard
templates.label: Onboarding Wizard
templates.description: Multi-step onboarding flow with Stepper, forms, and role selector

templates.name: ai-chat
templates.label: AI Chat Interface
templates.description: ChatGPT-style interface with messages, citations, and input

templates.name: crm-contacts
templates.label: CRM Contacts
templates.description: CRM contacts list with stats, search, and VirtualDataGrid

templates.name: email-inbox
templates.label: Email Inbox
templates.description: Email inbox with folder sidebar and scrollable message list

templates.name: team-management

templates.description: Team member grid with avatars, roles, and action menus

templates.name: file-manager
templates.label: File Manager
templates.description: File browser with breadcrumbs, folder/file grid, and upload

templates.name: landing-hero
templates.label: Landing Page
templates.description: Marketing page with hero, marquee, features, stats, testimonials, pricing, footer

templates.name: changelog

templates.description: Product changelog with Timeline, version badges, and release tags

templates.name: api-docs
templates.label: API Documentation
templates.description: API docs with endpoint sidebar, code examples, and response schemas

commonProps.type: Component name (PascalCase or snake_case). Required for every node.
commonProps.props: Object of HTML/CSS props passed to the element (e.g. className, style, id).
commonProps.children: Array of child nodes rendered inside this component.
commonProps.text: Shorthand for a single text child.
commonProps.action: Action identifier dispatched on click (for Button, OAuthButton).
commonProps.showIf: Conditional expression — node is only rendered if this evaluates to true.

tokenInterpolation.description: Server-side token interpolation replaces $ctx.* tokens with runtime values.
